rec_specific_object.locator: Pasted text.txt plus six ollama-test-and-monitor RTX3090 result archives from 2026-06-11 17:40-17:59 local run
rec_specific_object.summary: Real user-provided RTX 3090/Ollama run evidence for six generation models under the ADOS capability profile.
ADOS requirements for compaction, evidence ledger, materialization, verification, self-evaluation, repair, and package finalization alignment.

rec_specific_object.raw_request: Check the test results of 1.8; improve README with detailed command interpretation and no version wording; reduce duplicate output files; aggregate multi-model results into one ZIP; interpret best model for opencode, cursor, hermes, and ados; produce 1.9.
rec_specific_object.normalized_request: Produce ollama-info v1.9 with result review, authoritative README, output compaction, aggregate multi-model archive behavior, workload model recommendations, ADOS evidence, package zip, and quality evidence zip.

rec_specific_object.statement: README.md must use authoritative operating-guide language and must not mention release versions.
The wrapper must create one aggregate ZIP archive when multiple models are tested in one command.
ADOS capability rows must be counted as valid visible-answer rows when they produce visible output.
Thinking-only rows must not be counted as visible-answer speed.
Duplicate runtime output must be reduced without removing raw API or telemetry evidence needed for auditability.
The release package must retain one current logical evidence ledger and compact QA surfaces.
The final report must recommend models for OpenCode, Cursor, Hermes Agent, and ADOS from the supplied evidence.
